This is a site for a start-up called Arizmi. Try to make it look modern and premium. Follow the section designs outlined below, referencing the images and sites listed below. I have provided the paths to HTML versions of the sites.


# ⭐Navigation Bar

[https://www.framer.com/marketplace/components/floating-nav/](https://www.framer.com/marketplace/components/floating-nav/)

![][image1]

Let’s have this style of nav bar stickied to the top middle of the page. Each button just moves the screen down/up to that component

Transparent, minimal, and modern

What to copy:

- Logo+Text starts big, and goes small as you scroll down  
- Hero image in the middle **(to be created)**  
- Two CTA buttons \- one in nav bar (top right), one in the hero section **(location TBD)**  
- Header text  
  - Start-Up apps and websites, built by fellow Start-Up founders

Very minimal animations on each card

**1 — Understand**  
 We learn your idea, business model, and goals.

**2 — Plan & Build**  
 We shape the product strategy and build the right solution.

**3 — Launch & Grow**  
 We launch with you and support the next stage.

# ⭐Why Choose Us

[https://landio.framer.website/](https://landio.framer.website/)

@/Users/rafeediqbal/websites/landio

![][image7]

Let’s have something like this, but instead of it being animated, whichever box is clicked unblurs. Hope that makes sense

Here’s some placeholder copy:

Technical co-founder mindset  
We care about outcomes, not tickets.

Strategy \+ development  
We help shape the business, not just build features.

Founder-friendly approach  
Clear communication, no technical jargon.

Lean and fast  
Ship early, learn quickly.

Long-term partner  
We stay involved after launch.

Built for non-technical founders  
We translate ideas into real products.
